title: Write a field report on the city market
instructions: Go to the market, use look_around to inspect the inventory and prices. Then use create_document (service='market_report.md', text='<your findings in markdown>') to write a detailed report. Return to the bounty board, use deposit_item with service='doc:market_report.md' to deposit the document, then use complete_bounty.
hidden_criteria: GM: STRICT — verify 'document' items are deposited at the BOUNTY BOARD's inventory (not the agent's). If docs are in agent inventory but not the board, REJECT and tell them to deposit_item first. The document should contain observations about the market. If no document at the board, REJECT.

title: Supply run: deliver rations to the hotel
instructions: Go to the market or warehouse and use take_item with service='rations' to pick up rations. Then go to the hotel and use deposit_item with service='rations' to stock the hotel. Return to the bounty board and use complete_bounty.
hidden_criteria: GM: verify that the hotel's inventory now contains at least 1 rations that were not there before, OR the agent's action log shows a deposit_item of rations at the hotel. If the agent just visited without depositing, REJECT.

title: Broker a trade deal
instructions: Find another agent and start a face-to-face conversation (start_conversation). Negotiate and complete a trade using offer_trade (set text=items you offer, service=items you want). Both sides must agree. After the trade completes, return to the bounty board and use complete_bounty.
hidden_criteria: GM: verify the agent completed a successful trade after claiming this bounty. Look for 'Traded [...]' entries in the action log with another named agent. Simply starting a conversation is NOT enough — an actual item swap must have occurred. If no trade log entry exists, REJECT.
